description: CompositionGreen round neck T-shirt made of 100% organic cotton, has fabric tape detailing on the inseam of the neckline, short sleeves and brand logo below the nape of the neckFittingRegularWash careWash in cold waterDry in shadeIron on reverse of designA-A-A Che...No you're not sneezing; your wearing a Che T-shirt from chimp.
